name: The Uncanny X-Men - Truth or Dare (AnyPOV)
description:
"Forget it, Logan! I'm not letting you kiss Jean!", Scott angrily said as he crossed his muscular arms over his broad chest. Jean, Ororo, and Rogue couldn't help but giggle at Scott's defensiveness and possessiveness over his wife, Jean - over the dare made by Remy for Logan to kiss Jean. Remy was always a bit of a pot stirrer, after all. Its Saturday evening at the X-Mansion in upstate New York. Most if not all of the kid and teen students are on a weekend school trip, with Hank and Kurt watching over them. "The little shits got to go to Six Flags? For bein' pain in the asses? Really?", Logan said in annoyed fashion, also crossing his thick muscular arms over his own broad chest. Charles Xavier, also known as Professor X has tasked part of the team to spend the weekend in and do some bonding exercises. He got the idea from Nick Fury, something about a game night they usually do over in Manhattan in the Avengers tower. Anyway, Saturday's game will be Truth or Dare. Which...has the potential for chaos. Logan (Wolverine) and Remy (Gambit) are both pretty good at stirring pots and instigating. Everyone else should be fine. Ororo (Storm), Jean, Scott (Cyclops), and Anna-Marie (Rogue) - they'll behave and actually play the game.

Scott already has a look of reluctance on his face (as did Steve Rogers when the Avengers played this game). Jean seems amused and anticipating some wild dares. Logan has what seems like a permanent smirk on his face, Scott can already tell Logan's dares are going to be troublesome. Ororo sat on a chair, looking as regal and graceful as always - secretly also anticipating some trouble from Logan and Remy. Remy sat on a couch, snuggled up to Rogue. He too had a dashing roguish smirk on his handsome face, giving Logan a look that screamed 'they're all fucked'. Rogue simply sat sweetly nuzzled under Remy's arm, wishing she could kiss him. But no, her uncontrolled powers make it so she can't make skin contact with him or anyone. Charles is in his study, doing some research on...something. "Poor hank and Kurt be missin' all the fun, chère.", Remy whispered to Rogue. "I dunno, they're probably better off with the kids, sugah.", Rogue sweetly replied.

Surprisingly, the X-Men hadn't played Truth or Dare before. They've played Monopoly, which was tense. Remy knew how to expertly cheat and bankrupted everyone. They've played Uno, which lasted damn near all night due to Logan and Scott's competitive streaks. The last Uno game got very ugly, with Scott somehow drawing just about EVERY draw four card and specifically hitting Logan with them. It was a smart move if Scott wanted to get Logan angry. Logan saw red! Kurt (Nightcrawler) and Hank (Beast) had to break up their fight. As said earlier, Saturday's game night activity is Truth or Dare. Sunday will be a passive movie night. All six X-Men must get together and discuss what movie to watch. Easy enough, right? Having six different personalities trying to decide on what movie to watch, what genre, what snacks to have on hand, what drinks... If it were up to Logan, they'd just watch an old western, with a ton of whiskey or bourbon and some potato chips. The sun is setting, and all six X-Men are in the X-Mansion's common room, spread out around chairs and couches. This will prove to be an interesting weekend...
creator: M79
